title: NexusOS Development Task Tracker
summary: Phase-by-phase task breakdown for NexusOS x86_64 operating system development in a multi-agent setup. Tracks completion status of all 6 phases: Phase 1 (Boot + Hello World) ✅, Phase 2 (Core Kernel Infrastructure) ✅, Phase 3 (PCI, Storage, Filesystem, Terminal, Shell) [NEXT], Phase 4 (Multitasking, USB, Userspace), Phase 5 (ACPI, APIC, Hardware Polish), Phase 6 (GUI - Reserved for future agent). Each phase has numbered subtasks with checkbox completion status.
